evidence.scientific_clarity: Pipeline flows left-to-right with clear node labels; Retrieval and Generation groups boxed; solid vs dashed arrows correctly encode data-flow vs feedback; all stages from data.json rendered.
evidence.typography: pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype='none' set in rcParams; font stack prioritises Arial/Helvetica over DejaVu Sans; 8 pt body / 7.5 pt group labels are legible.
evidence.palette: Pastel per-module fill colours, dark edge colours, grey for dashed control arrows; no red/green directional confusion; palette is low-saturation and distinguishable for CVD.
evidence.layout_density: 11×5 inch canvas uses space well; groups and nodes spaced cleanly; legend placed in lower-left empty quadrant; no label overlap visible.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Legend distinguishes solid/dashed arrows; group borders match caption description ('dashed border'); caption correctly describes all depicted elements; no obvious Reviewer-2 complaints.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF produced by Matplotlib pdf backend with pdf.fonttype=42 (Type-1/TrueType embeds); file is real PDF 1.4 vector at 628×292 pts with 34 KB size.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (34 KB), figure.png (44 KB), figure.svg (11 KB), caption.tex (465 B), gen_figure.py (4.8 KB) all present and non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption accurately describes every component and arrow convention, but contains no quantitative claim or specific numeric finding (appropriate for a pipeline diagram, though rubric rewards a specific finding).

overall_strengths: Clean, readable architecture diagram with correct solid/dashed arrow semantics and well-labelled group regions.
Full vector pipeline: pdf.fonttype=42 + svg.fonttype='none' ensure selectable text in all output formats.
overall_weaknesses: Caption lacks any numerical or empirical claim; for a diagram-only figure this is expected, but the rubric penalises the absence.
DB/cylinder node rendering (polygon + two ellipses) is a reasonable approximation but leaves a small seam between the rectangle body and top cap at some zoom levels.
